description_long: This is a classic black top hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat, wide brim. The hat features a prominent decorative card tucked into the hatband on one side, adorned with a repeating pattern of red, orange, and yellow motifs, possibly resembling autumn leaves or stylized shapes. The surface of the hat appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a felt or satin-like material. The crown is flat-topped with subtle, gentle indentations along the upper edge, giving it a formal and traditional appearance. The brim is broad and flat, extending evenly around the base of the crown. The overall design is reminiscent of formal wear, often associated with magicians, performers, or historical urban fashion.
description: A black top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, and a decorative patterned card tucked into the hatband. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a formal, classic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black top hat with a flat crown and a wide brim, featuring a decorative patterned card prominently displayed in the hatband.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical shape of the crown and the edge of the decorative card protruding from the hatband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, smooth back of the hat with no visible decorations or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other edge of the decorative card and the continuous, unadorned surface of the hat.
